urls.description: Public HTTP(S) media-page URLs that the user is authorized to save.

outputDir.description: Absolute destination directory under the current workspace. The runtime canonicalizes and rejects any path outside that workspace.

container.description: auto: stream-copy MP4 then optional MKV fallback; mp4: stream-copy then H.264/AAC transcode only if needed; mkv: stream-copy MKV; original: keep verified original tracks.

allowFallback.description: Only affects container=auto: allow lossless MKV fallback when MP4 stream copy fails.

keepRawFiles.description: Keep acquired raw tracks only after a verified final result is atomically published.
